name: 4 Cup PP Pet Feeding Bowl - Boots & Barkley™ Steel Blue: Non-Slip Base, for Cats and Dogs, Polypropylene Material
description:
Suitable for both food and water, this 4 Cup PP Dog and Cat Bowl from Boots and Barkley™ is a practical addition to your pet's feeding routine. This dog and cat food bowl features a 4-cup capacity, a non-slip base for stability, and it's top rack dishwasher-safe for quick cleaning. Designed for everyday use, the propylene material makes mealtime easy.

Boots & Barkley™: Because pets are just the best.

100% satisfaction guaranteed or your money back.
